title: Attention Is All You Need
labelled_by: hand, reading the page text directly
note: Page indices are 0-based, matching the manifest. Only the pages listed here are labelled; the harness measures precision and recall over these alone and reports the rest as unmeasured. Page 2 contains two occurrences of the string 'Figure 1', but the first is the figure's own caption and is not a mention of itself.
